ops.body: Re-closing: review findings D2 (Transition.snapshot rejects non-empty foreign journal before taking ownership), D4 (sweepKey restore under context.WithoutCancel), D5 (post-Yield journal Apply uncancelable + fence release on failure) fixed with regression tests, committed 3d55ae2e. The macOS CI cancellation on that push was triaged and exonerated — pre-existing runner flake, drain passed in 1.184s in the cancelled run's own log; evidence in daemonkit cc-notes note b983140, fix lane running on the real cause (pipe-holding spawned children + harness -timeout racing the job cap). Subsequent CI green incl. drain: https://github.com/yasyf/daemonkit/actions/runs/29625574333.
